whoWeAre.title: Who we are
paragraphs: SiliconPlan is a digital platform that helps aspiring entrepreneurs, professionals, and organizations turn an idea into a structured, presentable, and fundable project.
Today, building a business requires multidisciplinary skills, diverse tools, and often high costs. SiliconPlan brings it all together in a single, accessible, guided platform.
Through an approach based on artificial intelligence, a structured methodology, and human support, we enable users to develop:

target.title: Who we serve
target.closing: The platform adapts to your profile

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Our mission is to make business creation and development more accessible, faster, and more effective. We want to break down the barriers that today prevent many ideas from becoming solid companies:
mission.callout: With SiliconPlan, anyone can build a solid entrepreneurial project, even starting from zero.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: We imagine an ecosystem where every valid entrepreneurial idea can be developed, validated, and funded, regardless of initial resources. We are the reference platform for the creation and development of Projects, integrating:

values.title: Our values
values.intro: We believe that anyone should have the chance to turn an idea into an entrepreneurial project. We reduce barriers, complexity, and costs, making the tools for building a business accessible to all.

items.title: Structure and method
items.body: Building a business is not only creativity: it is method. We offer a clear, guided path that helps users develop solid projects, step by step.

items.title: Useful innovation
items.body: We use artificial intelligence to simplify complex processes. Not to replace human thinking, but to enhance it.

items.title: Collaboration
items.body: We believe in the value of expertise. That's why we combine technology and consulting, creating an ecosystem that connects businesses and professionals.

items.title: Continuous growth
items.body: We are constantly evolving. We improve the platform thanks to user feedback and the evolution of the market. We want to contribute to a stronger entrepreneurial ecosystem, where more ideas can become concrete reality.

Pricing.title: Choose the plan that fits your project
Pricing.descFree: For those starting to structure their entrepreneurial idea.
Pricing.descStartup: For anyone who needs a complete, professional business plan.
Pricing.descUnicorn: For companies that need advanced financial tools to operate and grow.

Footer.description: SiliconPlan is a Smartool Srl product — Innovative Startup

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions here. If you don't find what you're looking for, get in touch.

items.question: What is Silicon Plan?
items.answer: Silicon Plan is a digital platform that helps you turn your entrepreneurial idea into a structured project, with AI tools and the support of expert consultants.

items.question: Who is the platform for?
items.answer: For businesses, startups, aspiring entrepreneurs, consultants, universities, incubators, and institutions. The platform adapts to your profile.

items.question: What documents can I generate?
items.answer: You can create Business Plans, Pitch Decks, Business Model Canvases, financial analyses, and pre-money valuations, all exportable to PDF, Word, and PowerPoint.

items.question: How does the consultant marketplace work?
items.answer: You can filter by skills, sector, and availability, and contact directly the consultant best suited to your needs.

items.question: Can I try Silicon Plan for free?
items.answer: Yes, the Free plan lets you get started right away at no cost. You can upgrade to the Startup or Unicorn plans whenever you need.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Yes, we are GDPR compliant and use advanced security standards to protect your data.

Contact.title: Let's talk
Contact.subtitle: Questions, demo requests, or collaboration ideas? Write to us and we'll respond within 24 hours.
